topic: Telomere shortening — aging's molecular clock explained
caption: Did you know your cells have a built-in clock? 🕰️ Telomeres are the protective caps on your chromosomes, and their shortening is linked to aging. Here are 5 facts: Telomere length decreases by 1% every year after 20. 📉 Stress and inflammation accelerate this process. 🌪️ A healthy lifestyle can slow it down. 🏋️‍♀️ Telomere length is linked to chronic diseases like cancer and diabetes. 🚨 Scientists are exploring ways to lengthen telomeres. 🔬 Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future body will thank you. 💕 #TelomereShortening #Aging #MolecularClock #CellHealth #HealthyLifestyle
